title: FIFA World Cup Triggers a Global Anti-Piracy Crackdown
excerpt: During the FIFA World Cup, law enforcement and private partners across multiple continents carried out one of the largest anti-piracy sweeps.
content_html:
As the FIFA World Cup is gearing up for the grande finale in New York this weekend, international law enforcement offices look back at one of the largest anti-piracy efforts in sports history.

With help from private and public partners from all over the world, authorities seized well over a thousand domain names of pirate sports streaming sites. In the United States, the effort was branded “Operation Offsides”, which initially targeted nearly 400 domain names offering unauthorized World Cup streams. That turned out to be just the start.

Operation Offsides

The U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) announced Operation Offsides on June 26, targeting pirate sites that streamed World Cup matches. The seizure warrant was filed in the Eastern District of Virginia, but this appears to be sealed, as we were unable to locate a copy in the court database.

The DOJ and Homeland Security Investigations ran a similar crackdown during the 2022 Qatar World Cup, seizing 78 domains at the time. The 2026 action is at least five times larger, however, and was the result of international cooperation.

The domains were identified with assistance from FIFA, beIN Media Group, NBCUniversal, ACE, the UFC, and Warner Bros. International coordination through the DOJ’s ICHIP network extended the operation’s reach to Peru and Bulgaria, described in the announcement as known centers of online piracy activity, with supporting actions in Croatia, Romania, Poland, and Colombia.

The authorities did not mention any domains by name but TorrentFreak traced many through passive DNS data, with the current tally at 627 identified domains (listed below). While the seizures hit several major sports streaming sites, other popular sites operating under foreign-registry TLDs outside U.S. jurisdiction managed to survive.

Visitors of the blocked domain names, meanwhile, ran into the following splash banner, listing many of the partners involved.

The seizure banner

The “Operation Offsides” seizures came in waves. Last weekend, more than 100 additional domains were seized, many of them fallback domains that pirate sites had switched to after the initial round. That same report also revealed that several operators switched to Iranian .ir fallback domains, in an effort to switch to infrastructure that is harder for U.S. law enforcement to reach.

Colombia Leads “Operation Red Card”

Two days before the World Cup final, Colombia’s Fiscalía General announced the results of a separate multinational enforcement effort it had coordinated under the name “Operación Tarjeta Roja” (Operation Red Card).

The international action brought together prosecutors, law enforcement agencies, and public ministries from nine countries: Colombia, the United States, Ecuador, Peru, Paraguay, Argentina, the Dominican Republic, Brazil, and Chile, with support from private-sector audiovisual and sports organizations.

In Colombia alone, 1,140 domains and URLs used for unauthorized sports streaming were ‘suspended’. Across all participating countries, the total reached 1,840. Similar to the U.S. operation, the authorities did not name any domains.

“While the planet focused on the FIFA World Cup 2026, a group of nations went after the structures that profit from counterfeiting and theft of digital content,” said Fiscalía’s Raúl González Flechas, commenting on the news.

The Colombian operation, which targeted both counterfeiting and piracy, also resulted in 15 arrests. Four suspects in Soacha, near Bogotá, were accused of hacking into a telecom company’s platforms to offer cheap ‘pirated’ cable TV, posing as employees of the company. Two of the four accepted the charges.

Separately, 11 people running shops selling counterfeit World Cup merchandise were charged with trademark infringement and related offenses. Authorities seized 4,223 counterfeit sports items, 11,353 fake logos ready to be applied to garments, and 2,150 counterfeit Colombian Football Federation shields during raids in Bogotá, Itagüí, Cali, Acacías, and Bucaramanga.

Argentina Blocks FútbolLibre

Argentina also contributed to Operación Tarjeta Roja earlier in the tournament. In early July, the country’s UFECI cybercrime unit opened investigations against three platforms: Stella TV, Tele Latino, and sites associated with FútbolLibre, one of the most widely used pirate sports streaming brands in the country.

FútbolLibre had already been under investigation since 2022. This time, complaints from rightsholders DirecTV and Personal Flow provided additional evidence.

Three federal judges ordered ENACOM, Argentina’s communications regulator, and NIC Argentina, the country’s domain registry, to block access to 14 platforms and sites. However, as is often the case, there is no shortage of copycats using the same brands.

Pirate Ad Revenue Targeted

The enforcement wave was not limited to government action. The Trustworthy Accountability Group (TAG) previously announced that it had cut off advertising revenue to 1,376 sites that illegally streamed sports or offered other World Cup content, through its Pirate Domain Exclusion List.

Rather than targeting domains directly, TAG aims to starve pirate streaming site operators of the ad revenue, so they will eventually give up.

“Global sporting events like the World Cup are prime targets for criminals who try to intercept legitimate ad dollars by stealing popular streaming content,” said TAG COO Rachel Nyswander Thomas.

More Results Expected

With the World Cup final set for this weekend, additional enforcement results from other participating countries may still be announced.

Whether these combined efforts have had lasting impact on pirate sports streaming availability has yet to be seen. The disruption certainly has an effect, but the enforcement efforts have also shown that some pirate site operators are resilient.

The success of these and future enforcement efforts will largely depend on how far the reach of the international authorities goes, and whether pirate site operators can still find unblocked fallback infrastructure. By the next World Cup in 2030 we should know more.

—

This article will be updated if more results from participating countries or partners come in.
—–

blocks.html_en: As the FIFA World Cup is gearing up for the grande finale in New York this weekend, international law enforcement offices look back at one of the largest anti-piracy efforts in sports history.

sentences.en: As the FIFA World Cup is gearing up for the grande finale in New York this weekend, international law enforcement offices look back at one of the largest anti-piracy efforts in sports history.
sentences.zh: 随着国际足联世界杯为本周末在纽约举行的压轴大戏做准备，国际执法机构回顾了体育史上最大规模的反盗版行动之一。

blocks.html_en: With help from private and public partners from all over the world, authorities seized well over a thousand domain names of pirate sports streaming sites. In the United States, the effort was branded “Operation Offsides”, which initially targeted nearly 400 domain names offering unauthorized World Cup streams. That turned out to be just the start.

sentences.en: With help from private and public partners from all over the world, authorities seized well over a thousand domain names of pirate sports streaming sites.
sentences.zh: 在世界各地私人和公共合作伙伴的帮助下，当局查获了一千多个盗版体育流媒体网站的域名。

sentences.en: In the United States, the effort was branded “Operation Offsides”, which initially targeted nearly 400 domain names offering unauthorized World Cup streams.
sentences.zh: 在美国，这一行动被称为“Operation Offsides”，最初针对的是近 400 个提供未经授权的世界杯直播的域名。

sentences.en: That turned out to be just the start.
sentences.zh: 事实证明这只是一个开始。

blocks.html_en: Operation Offsides

sentences.en: Operation Offsides
sentences.zh: 越位操作

blocks.html_en: The U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) announced Operation Offsides on June 26, targeting pirate sites that streamed World Cup matches. The seizure warrant was filed in the Eastern District of Virginia, but this appears to be sealed, as we were unable to locate a copy in the court database.

sentences.en: The U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) announced Operation Offsides on June 26, targeting pirate sites that streamed World Cup matches.
sentences.zh: 美国司法部 (DOJ) 于 6 月 26 日宣布实施越位行动，针对转播世界杯比赛的盗版网站。

sentences.en: The seizure warrant was filed in the Eastern District of Virginia, but this appears to be sealed, as we were unable to locate a copy in the court database.
sentences.zh: 扣押令是在弗吉尼亚州东区提交的，但似乎已被密封，因为我们无法在法院数据库中找到副本。

blocks.html_en: The DOJ and Homeland Security Investigations ran a similar crackdown during the 2022 Qatar World Cup, seizing 78 domains at the time. The 2026 action is at least five times larger, however, and was the result of international cooperation.

sentences.en: The DOJ and Homeland Security Investigations ran a similar crackdown during the 2022 Qatar World Cup, seizing 78 domains at the time.
sentences.zh: 美国司法部和国土安全调查局在 2022 年卡塔尔世界杯期间进行了类似的打击行动，当时查封了 78 个域名。

sentences.en: The 2026 action is at least five times larger, however, and was the result of international cooperation.
sentences.zh: 然而，2026 年的行动规模至少是其五倍，并且是国际合作的结果。

blocks.html_en: The domains were identified with assistance from FIFA, beIN Media Group, NBCUniversal, ACE, the UFC, and Warner Bros. International coordination through the DOJ’s ICHIP network extended the operation’s reach to Peru and Bulgaria, described in the announcement as known centers of online piracy activity, with supporting actions in Croatia, Romania, Poland, and Colombia.

sentences.en: The domains were identified with assistance from FIFA, beIN Media Group, NBCUniversal, ACE, the UFC, and Warner Bros.
sentences.zh: 这些域名是在 FIFA、beIN Media Group、NBCUniversal、ACE、UFC 和华纳兄弟的协助下确定的。

sentences.en: International coordination through the DOJ’s ICHIP network extended the operation’s reach to Peru and Bulgaria, described in the announcement as known centers of online piracy activity, with supporting actions in Croatia, Romania, Poland, and Colombia.
sentences.zh: 通过司法部的 ICHIP 网络进行的国际协调将行动范围扩大到秘鲁和保加利亚，公告中将其描述为已知的在线盗版活动中心，并在克罗地亚、罗马尼亚、波兰和哥伦比亚采取了支持行动。

blocks.html_en: The authorities did not mention any domains by name but TorrentFreak traced many through passive DNS data, with the current tally at 627 identified domains (listed below). While the seizures hit several major sports streaming sites, other popular sites operating under foreign-registry TLDs outside U.S. jurisdiction managed to survive.

sentences.en: The authorities did not mention any domains by name but TorrentFreak traced many through passive DNS data, with the current tally at 627 identified domains (listed below).
sentences.zh: 当局没有提及任何域名的名称，但 TorrentFreak 通过被动 DNS 数据追踪了许多域名，目前已识别域名数量为 627 个（如下所列）。

sentences.en: While the seizures hit several major sports streaming sites, other popular sites operating under foreign-registry TLDs outside U.S. jurisdiction managed to survive.
sentences.zh: 虽然几家主要体育流媒体网站遭到查封，但在美国管辖范围之外的外国注册顶级域名 (TLD) 下运营的其他热门网站却得以幸存。

blocks.html_en: Visitors of the blocked domain names, meanwhile, ran into the following splash banner, listing many of the partners involved.

sentences.en: Visitors of the blocked domain names, meanwhile, ran into the following splash banner, listing many of the partners involved.
sentences.zh: 与此同时，被阻止域名的访问者遇到了以下醒目的横幅，其中列出了许多涉及的合作伙伴。

blocks.html_en: The seizure banner

sentences.en: The seizure banner
sentences.zh: 查获横幅

blocks.html_en: The “Operation Offsides” seizures came in waves. Last weekend, more than 100 additional domains were seized, many of them fallback domains that pirate sites had switched to after the initial round. That same report also revealed that several operators switched to Iranian .ir fallback domains, in an effort to switch to infrastructure that is harder for U.S. law enforcement to reach.

sentences.en: The “Operation Offsides” seizures came in waves.
sentences.zh: “越位行动”的查获行动一波又一波地进行。

sentences.en: Last weekend, more than 100 additional domains were seized, many of them fallback domains that pirate sites had switched to after the initial round.
sentences.zh: 上周末，又查获了 100 多个域名，其中许多是盗版网站在第一轮后转向的后备域名。

sentences.en: That same report also revealed that several operators switched to Iranian .ir fallback domains, in an effort to switch to infrastructure that is harder for U.S. law enforcement to reach.
sentences.zh: 同一份报告还透露，一些运营商转向了伊朗 .ir 后备域，试图转向美国执法部门更难触及的基础设施。

blocks.html_en: Colombia Leads “Operation Red Card”

sentences.en: Colombia Leads “Operation Red Card”
sentences.zh: 哥伦比亚领导“红牌行动”

blocks.html_en: Two days before the World Cup final, Colombia’s Fiscalía General announced the results of a separate multinational enforcement effort it had coordinated under the name “Operación Tarjeta Roja” (Operation Red Card).

sentences.en: Two days before the World Cup final, Colombia’s Fiscalía General announced the results of a separate multinational enforcement effort it had coordinated under the name “Operación Tarjeta Roja” (Operation Red Card).
sentences.zh: 世界杯决赛前两天，哥伦比亚财政总局宣布了一项名为“红牌行动”的多国执法行动的结果。

blocks.html_en: The international action brought together prosecutors, law enforcement agencies, and public ministries from nine countries: Colombia, the United States, Ecuador, Peru, Paraguay, Argentina, the Dominican Republic, Brazil, and Chile, with support from private-sector audiovisual and sports organizations.

sentences.en: The international action brought together prosecutors, law enforcement agencies, and public ministries from nine countries: Colombia, the United States, Ecuador, Peru, Paraguay, Argentina, the Dominican Republic, Brazil, and Chile, with support from private-sector audiovisual and sports organizations.
sentences.zh: 这项国际行动汇集了来自九个国家的检察官、执法机构和公共部门：哥伦比亚、美国、厄瓜多尔、秘鲁、巴拉圭、阿根廷、多米尼加共和国、巴西和智利，并得到了私营部门视听和体育组织的支持。

blocks.html_en: In Colombia alone, 1,140 domains and URLs used for unauthorized sports streaming were ‘suspended’. Across all participating countries, the total reached 1,840. Similar to the U.S. operation, the authorities did not name any domains.

sentences.en: In Colombia alone, 1,140 domains and URLs used for unauthorized sports streaming were ‘suspended’.
sentences.zh: 仅在哥伦比亚，就有 1,140 个用于未经授权的体育赛事直播的域名和 URL 被“暂停”。

sentences.en: Across all participating countries, the total reached 1,840.
sentences.zh: 所有参与国家的总数达到 1,840 个。

sentences.en: Similar to the U.S. operation, the authorities did not name any domains.
sentences.zh: 与美国的行动类似，当局没有命名任何域名。

blocks.html_en: “While the planet focused on the FIFA World Cup 2026, a group of nations went after the structures that profit from counterfeiting and theft of digital content,” said Fiscalía’s Raúl González Flechas, commenting on the news.

sentences.en: “While the planet focused on the FIFA World Cup 2026, a group of nations went after the structures that profit from counterfeiting and theft of digital content,” said Fiscalía’s Raúl González Flechas, commenting on the news.
sentences.zh: Fiscalía 的劳尔·冈萨雷斯·弗莱查斯 (Raúl González Flechas) 在评论该消息时表示：“当全世界都在关注 2026 年 FIFA 世界杯时，一些国家却在追捕那些通过伪造和盗窃数字内容获利的组织。”

blocks.html_en: The Colombian operation, which targeted both counterfeiting and piracy, also resulted in 15 arrests. Four suspects in Soacha, near Bogotá, were accused of hacking into a telecom company’s platforms to offer cheap ‘pirated’ cable TV, posing as employees of the company. Two of the four accepted the charges.

sentences.en: The Colombian operation, which targeted both counterfeiting and piracy, also resulted in 15 arrests.
sentences.zh: 哥伦比亚的这次打击假冒和盗版行动也导致 15 人被捕。

sentences.en: Four suspects in Soacha, near Bogotá, were accused of hacking into a telecom company’s platforms to offer cheap ‘pirated’ cable TV, posing as employees of the company.
sentences.zh: 波哥大附近索阿查的四名嫌疑人被指控侵入一家电信公司的平台，冒充该公司的员工提供廉价的“盗版”有线电视。

sentences.en: Two of the four accepted the charges.
sentences.zh: 四人中的两人接受了指控。

blocks.html_en: Separately, 11 people running shops selling counterfeit World Cup merchandise were charged with trademark infringement and related offenses. Authorities seized 4,223 counterfeit sports items, 11,353 fake logos ready to be applied to garments, and 2,150 counterfeit Colombian Football Federation shields during raids in Bogotá, Itagüí, Cali, Acacías, and Bucaramanga.

sentences.en: Separately, 11 people running shops selling counterfeit World Cup merchandise were charged with trademark infringement and related offenses.
sentences.zh: 另外，11 名经营销售假冒世界杯商品的商店的人被指控侵犯商标权及相关罪行。

sentences.en: Authorities seized 4,223 counterfeit sports items, 11,353 fake logos ready to be applied to garments, and 2,150 counterfeit Colombian Football Federation shields during raids in Bogotá, Itagüí, Cali, Acacías, and Bucaramanga.
sentences.zh: 当局在波哥大、伊塔圭、卡利、阿卡西亚斯和布卡拉曼加的突袭中查获了 4,223 件假冒体育用品、11,353 个准备贴在服装上的假冒标识以及 2,150 个假冒哥伦比亚足协盾牌。

blocks.html_en: Argentina Blocks FútbolLibre

sentences.en: Argentina Blocks FútbolLibre
sentences.zh: 阿根廷队封锁 FútbolLibre

blocks.html_en: Argentina also contributed to Operación Tarjeta Roja earlier in the tournament. In early July, the country’s UFECI cybercrime unit opened investigations against three platforms: Stella TV, Tele Latino, and sites associated with FútbolLibre, one of the most widely used pirate sports streaming brands in the country.

sentences.en: Argentina also contributed to Operación Tarjeta Roja earlier in the tournament.
sentences.zh: 阿根廷队在比赛早些时候也对红牌行动做出了贡献。

sentences.en: In early July, the country’s UFECI cybercrime unit opened investigations against three platforms: Stella TV, Tele Latino, and sites associated with FútbolLibre, one of the most widely used pirate sports streaming brands in the country.
sentences.zh: 7 月初，该国 UFECI 网络犯罪部门对三个平台展开调查：Stella TV、Tele Latino 以及与 FútbolLibre（该国使用最广泛的盗版体育流媒体品牌之一）相关的网站。

blocks.html_en: FútbolLibre had already been under investigation since 2022. This time, complaints from rightsholders DirecTV and Personal Flow provided additional evidence.

sentences.en: FútbolLibre had already been under investigation since 2022.
sentences.zh: FútbolLibre 自 2022 年以来就已接受调查。

sentences.en: This time, complaints from rightsholders DirecTV and Personal Flow provided additional evidence.
sentences.zh: 这次，版权所有者 DirecTV 和 Personal Flow 的投诉提供了额外的证据。

blocks.html_en: Three federal judges ordered ENACOM, Argentina’s communications regulator, and NIC Argentina, the country’s domain registry, to block access to 14 platforms and sites. However, as is often the case, there is no shortage of copycats using the same brands.

sentences.en: Three federal judges ordered ENACOM, Argentina’s communications regulator, and NIC Argentina, the country’s domain registry, to block access to 14 platforms and sites.
sentences.zh: 三名联邦法官命令阿根廷通信监管机构 ENACOM 和该国域名注册机构 NIC Argentina 阻止对 14 个平台和网站的访问。

sentences.en: However, as is often the case, there is no shortage of copycats using the same brands.
sentences.zh: 然而，正如通常的情况一样，不乏使用相同品牌的模仿者。

blocks.html_en: Pirate Ad Revenue Targeted

sentences.en: Pirate Ad Revenue Targeted
sentences.zh: 盗版广告收入目标

blocks.html_en: The enforcement wave was not limited to government action. The Trustworthy Accountability Group (TAG) previously announced that it had cut off advertising revenue to 1,376 sites that illegally streamed sports or offered other World Cup content, through its Pirate Domain Exclusion List.

sentences.en: The enforcement wave was not limited to government action.
sentences.zh: 执法浪潮不仅限于政府行动。

sentences.en: The Trustworthy Accountability Group (TAG) previously announced that it had cut off advertising revenue to 1,376 sites that illegally streamed sports or offered other World Cup content, through its Pirate Domain Exclusion List.
sentences.zh: Trustworthy Accountability Group (TAG) 此前宣布，已通过其盗版域名排除列表切断了 1,376 个非法直播体育赛事或提供其他世界杯内容的网站的广告收入。

blocks.html_en: Rather than targeting domains directly, TAG aims to starve pirate streaming site operators of the ad revenue, so they will eventually give up.

sentences.en: Rather than targeting domains directly, TAG aims to starve pirate streaming site operators of the ad revenue, so they will eventually give up.
sentences.zh: TAG 并不是直接针对域名，而是旨在让盗版流媒体网站运营商失去广告收入，因此他们最终会放弃。

blocks.html_en: “Global sporting events like the World Cup are prime targets for criminals who try to intercept legitimate ad dollars by stealing popular streaming content,” said TAG COO Rachel Nyswander Thomas.

sentences.en: “Global sporting events like the World Cup are prime targets for criminals who try to intercept legitimate ad dollars by stealing popular streaming content,” said TAG COO Rachel Nyswander Thomas.
sentences.zh: TAG 首席运营官 Rachel Nyswander Thomas 表示：“世界杯等全球体育赛事是犯罪分子的主要目标，他们试图通过窃取流行的流媒体内容来拦截合法的广告收入。”

blocks.html_en: More Results Expected

sentences.en: More Results Expected
sentences.zh: 预计会有更多结果

blocks.html_en: With the World Cup final set for this weekend, additional enforcement results from other participating countries may still be announced.

sentences.en: With the World Cup final set for this weekend, additional enforcement results from other participating countries may still be announced.
sentences.zh: 由于世界杯决赛将于本周末举行，其他参赛国的额外执法结果可能仍会公布。

blocks.html_en: Whether these combined efforts have had lasting impact on pirate sports streaming availability has yet to be seen. The disruption certainly has an effect, but the enforcement efforts have also shown that some pirate site operators are resilient.

sentences.en: Whether these combined efforts have had lasting impact on pirate sports streaming availability has yet to be seen.
sentences.zh: 这些综合努力是否会对盗版体育流媒体的可用性产生持久影响还有待观察。

sentences.en: The disruption certainly has an effect, but the enforcement efforts have also shown that some pirate site operators are resilient.
sentences.zh: 这种破坏肯定会产生影响，但执法工作也表明一些盗版网站运营商具有弹性。

blocks.html_en: The success of these and future enforcement efforts will largely depend on how far the reach of the international authorities goes, and whether pirate site operators can still find unblocked fallback infrastructure. By the next World Cup in 2030 we should know more.

sentences.en: The success of these and future enforcement efforts will largely depend on how far the reach of the international authorities goes, and whether pirate site operators can still find unblocked fallback infrastructure.
sentences.zh: 这些和未来执法工作的成功将在很大程度上取决于国际当局的影响力有多大，以及盗版网站运营商是否仍然可以找到畅通无阻的后备基础设施。

sentences.en: By the next World Cup in 2030 we should know more.
sentences.zh: 到 2030 年下一届世界杯，我们应该了解更多。

sentences.en: This article will be updated if more results from participating countries or partners come in. —–
sentences.zh: 如果参与国家或合作伙伴有更多结果出现，本文将进行更新。 —–

content_html_zh:
随着国际足联世界杯为本周末在纽约举行的压轴大戏做准备，国际执法机构回顾了体育史上最大规模的反盗版行动之一。

在世界各地私人和公共合作伙伴的帮助下，当局查获了一千多个盗版体育流媒体网站的域名。 在美国，这一行动被称为“Operation Offsides”，最初针对的是近 400 个提供未经授权的世界杯直播的域名。 事实证明这只是一个开始。

越位操作

美国司法部 (DOJ) 于 6 月 26 日宣布实施越位行动，针对转播世界杯比赛的盗版网站。 扣押令是在弗吉尼亚州东区提交的，但似乎已被密封，因为我们无法在法院数据库中找到副本。

美国司法部和国土安全调查局在 2022 年卡塔尔世界杯期间进行了类似的打击行动，当时查封了 78 个域名。 然而，2026 年的行动规模至少是其五倍，并且是国际合作的结果。

这些域名是在 FIFA、beIN Media Group、NBCUniversal、ACE、UFC 和华纳兄弟的协助下确定的。 通过司法部的 ICHIP 网络进行的国际协调将行动范围扩大到秘鲁和保加利亚，公告中将其描述为已知的在线盗版活动中心，并在克罗地亚、罗马尼亚、波兰和哥伦比亚采取了支持行动。

当局没有提及任何域名的名称，但 TorrentFreak 通过被动 DNS 数据追踪了许多域名，目前已识别域名数量为 627 个（如下所列）。 虽然几家主要体育流媒体网站遭到查封，但在美国管辖范围之外的外国注册顶级域名 (TLD) 下运营的其他热门网站却得以幸存。

与此同时，被阻止域名的访问者遇到了以下醒目的横幅，其中列出了许多涉及的合作伙伴。

查获横幅

“越位行动”的查获行动一波又一波地进行。 上周末，又查获了 100 多个域名，其中许多是盗版网站在第一轮后转向的后备域名。 同一份报告还透露，一些运营商转向了伊朗 .ir 后备域，试图转向美国执法部门更难触及的基础设施。

哥伦比亚领导“红牌行动”

世界杯决赛前两天，哥伦比亚财政总局宣布了一项名为“红牌行动”的多国执法行动的结果。

这项国际行动汇集了来自九个国家的检察官、执法机构和公共部门：哥伦比亚、美国、厄瓜多尔、秘鲁、巴拉圭、阿根廷、多米尼加共和国、巴西和智利，并得到了私营部门视听和体育组织的支持。

仅在哥伦比亚，就有 1,140 个用于未经授权的体育赛事直播的域名和 URL 被“暂停”。 所有参与国家的总数达到 1,840 个。 与美国的行动类似，当局没有命名任何域名。

Fiscalía 的劳尔·冈萨雷斯·弗莱查斯 (Raúl González Flechas) 在评论该消息时表示：“当全世界都在关注 2026 年 FIFA 世界杯时，一些国家却在追捕那些通过伪造和盗窃数字内容获利的组织。”

哥伦比亚的这次打击假冒和盗版行动也导致 15 人被捕。 波哥大附近索阿查的四名嫌疑人被指控侵入一家电信公司的平台，冒充该公司的员工提供廉价的“盗版”有线电视。 四人中的两人接受了指控。

另外，11 名经营销售假冒世界杯商品的商店的人被指控侵犯商标权及相关罪行。 当局在波哥大、伊塔圭、卡利、阿卡西亚斯和布卡拉曼加的突袭中查获了 4,223 件假冒体育用品、11,353 个准备贴在服装上的假冒标识以及 2,150 个假冒哥伦比亚足协盾牌。

阿根廷队封锁 FútbolLibre

阿根廷队在比赛早些时候也对红牌行动做出了贡献。 7 月初，该国 UFECI 网络犯罪部门对三个平台展开调查：Stella TV、Tele Latino 以及与 FútbolLibre（该国使用最广泛的盗版体育流媒体品牌之一）相关的网站。

FútbolLibre 自 2022 年以来就已接受调查。 这次，版权所有者 DirecTV 和 Personal Flow 的投诉提供了额外的证据。

三名联邦法官命令阿根廷通信监管机构 ENACOM 和该国域名注册机构 NIC Argentina 阻止对 14 个平台和网站的访问。 然而，正如通常的情况一样，不乏使用相同品牌的模仿者。

盗版广告收入目标

执法浪潮不仅限于政府行动。 Trustworthy Accountability Group (TAG) 此前宣布，已通过其盗版域名排除列表切断了 1,376 个非法直播体育赛事或提供其他世界杯内容的网站的广告收入。

TAG 并不是直接针对域名，而是旨在让盗版流媒体网站运营商失去广告收入，因此他们最终会放弃。

TAG 首席运营官 Rachel Nyswander Thomas 表示：“世界杯等全球体育赛事是犯罪分子的主要目标，他们试图通过窃取流行的流媒体内容来拦截合法的广告收入。”

预计会有更多结果

由于世界杯决赛将于本周末举行，其他参赛国的额外执法结果可能仍会公布。

这些综合努力是否会对盗版体育流媒体的可用性产生持久影响还有待观察。 这种破坏肯定会产生影响，但执法工作也表明一些盗版网站运营商具有弹性。

这些和未来执法工作的成功将在很大程度上取决于国际当局的影响力有多大，以及盗版网站运营商是否仍然可以找到畅通无阻的后备基础设施。 到 2030 年下一届世界杯，我们应该了解更多。
